act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: A supply made by an approved charitable institution, if—
content:
13. A supply made by an approved charitable institution, if—
(a) the supply is of a prescribed kind; or
(b) the supply relates to any specified religious, charitable, or other non-
profit activities.
Culture
